name: Cheddar Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the cheddar cheese and add the eggs, mixing well.
2. Stir in the flour and salt until combined.
3. Drop by tablespoons into the rapidly boiling water.
4. Cover and boil for 15 minutes.
5. Drain the dumplings.
6. Serve with melted butter and sour cream.
7. Sprinkle with chopped parsley or paprika, if desired.
